title: helichrysum brownei var. brownei
intro: Helichrysum brownei var. brownei, also known as Island Helichrysum or St. Croix Helichrysum, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Caribbean island of St. Croix. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Helichrysum brownei var. brownei include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum brownei var. brownei can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy due to its calming and uplifting properties.
